VAL-CROSS-001.evidence: Logged in at /login, redirected to /dashboard. Verified API calls used cookies (no Authorization header). Clicked logout, redirected to /login. Subsequent API calls returned 401.

VAL-CROSS-003.evidence: Created product FT4-Lifecycle Product in dashboard form. Saw it in product list table. Opened detail. Minted it. Saw QR code and passport data. Downloaded QR successfully.

VAL-CROSS-004.evidence: After creating product via dashboard form, navigated back to /dashboard/products. New product FT4-Lifecycle Product appeared in the table.
